mainEntity.name: How do Google Reviews factor into AI visibility for Houston attorneys?
mainEntity.text: How do Google Reviews factor into AI visibility for Houston attorneys?

acceptedAnswer.text: High-volume verified Google Reviews directly influence FirmRanker and AI recommendations, especially in Houston's review-sensitive market.

suggestedAnswer.text: Aim for 50+ 4.8+ stars. AI pulls for trust signals. Monitor via FirmRanker. Boosts boutiques without Chambers. Ethical solicitation key—avoid bar violations.

name: Google Reviews Role in Houston AI Visibility
